metadata.defaultDescription: I design and build modern, high-performance web applications. 20+ years of experience, hands-on CTO, full remote, bilingual FR/EN.

hero.title: From prototype to production.

missions.label: SERVICES
missions.title: Flexible engagement formats
missions.pageDescription: From short-term reinforcement to strategic support, I adapt to your context, timeline, and technical challenges.

sections.title: Short-term missions
sections.description: Focused interventions to unblock, deliver, or secure a specific scope without a long-term commitment.
highlights: Technical audit or architecture review
Reinforcement on a sprint or critical release
Priority technical debt and bug fixes
Feature development or proof of concept
Setup of a tool, dashboard, or automation

examples.title: Mail merge and document generation
examples.description: Development of automated systems for generating personalized documents (contracts, certificates, letters, invoices, reports) from databases or business files. Automated email delivery.

examples.title: Release reinforcement on a B2B marketplace
examples.description: Stabilizing a critical release: priority bug fixes, test hardening, and deployment safety.

examples.title: Data visualization and executive dashboards
examples.description: Design and implementation of interactive dashboards in Looker Studio, Power BI, and other business intelligence platforms. Setup of key metrics (KPIs), real-time visualizations, and decision-support tools.

sections.title: Long-term missions
sections.description: Engagements over several weeks or months to build, evolve, or modernize a product or platform.
highlights: Production-grade fullstack Next.js / TypeScript development
Evolution of existing applications (PHP, Java, legacy)
Stack migration, progressive rewrite, or modularization
API, data, reporting, and business workflow integration
CI/CD, observability, and delivery best practices

examples.title: Next.js + AWS serverless deployment POC
examples.description: Technical validation of a Next.js / OpenNext stack on AWS (Lambda, S3, CloudFront) with an operational CI/CD pipeline.

examples.title: Business platform evolution
examples.description: Fullstack development, business workflows, reporting, and deployments for a marketplace and 15 enterprise client platforms (PHP, MySQL, ElasticSearch).

examples.title: Progressive frontend rewrite and stack modernization
examples.description: Incremental migration to Next.js / TypeScript, design system rollout, and improved delivery practices (CI/CD, code quality).

projects.label: SELECTED PROJECTS

timeline.label: EXPERIENCE
timeline.title: 20+ years of experience at the service of your projects
timeline.pageDescription: Turn complex challenges into operational solutions. From space to modern web applications, with a pragmatic approach focused on reliability.

highlights: Development of modern web applications with Next.js and TypeScript
Business workflow automation and reporting
Internal tools focused on productivity and data
API integration, dashboards, and data processing
Development, maintenance, and evolution of the B2B platform and 15 B2B platforms
Development of internal PHP / JavaScript / CSS framework
Production infrastructure supervision and administration (OVH / Debian / Nginx / MySQL / ElasticSearch)
Team structuring and Agile practices
Cybersecurity leadership (SAST, hardening, detection tools)
Development of a satellite-based volcanic detection system
Data processing and scientific platform
Development of wealth management web applications
Contribution to internal Java framework (J2EE, Spring, Tomcat)
Design and evolution of business software components
Technical consulting on application architecture

items.role: Ph.D. in Geophysics — Active deformation in South Iceland observed by space geodetic methods
highlights: Large-scale geodetic data analysis (GPS, InSAR)
Physical modeling and data inversion
Scientific tools and processing pipelines development
High-performance computing and numerical simulations
Linux systems administration and scientific infrastructure management

items.role: Software Architect / Engineer — Cassini Huygens ground data segment
highlights: Development of scientific and space systems
Calibration, navigation and infrared and optical data processing system

items.role: Software Engineer — Mars Express HRSC acquisition planning
highlights: Characterization of the Martian surface from heterogeneous data and ACP
Development of hyperspectral image analysis software
Development of ARIANE 5 control command test bench
Development of data loaders, raster, vector, 3D (DEM)
3D simulation to model missile trajectory

items.description: Crustal deformation from geodetic techniques: earthquakes and plate movements in the South Iceland Seismic Zone.
Master's in software engineering, specialization in Artificial Intelligence and Human-Machine Interface.
Associate degree in computer science (special year program).

about.title: About
about.description: Senior fullstack developer with 20+ years of experience, specialized in modern web applications.
about.content: Passionate about web development for 20+ years, I help companies build high-performance digital products. My approach combines technical expertise, product vision, and pragmatism to deliver solutions that create value.
